title: MAIN Adjustable Dog Car Safety Seat Belt - Harness Dog Seatbelt Safety Lead - Cat & Pets (BLACK)
features: ✦Construction✦ Zubality dog car seat belt is built with the metal stainless steel hook/clip and highly strong nylon fabric.

✦Hook & Clip✦ Seat belt clip to use simply onto your dogs collar harness and then plug into your car seat belt if you suddenly brake Then the ideal pet accessories for dogs to prevent your pet being hurt.

✦Quality Strong Stainless Material✦ The loop on the dog seat belt is made from strong zinc alloy metal that is stainless and non rusting. You won’t have to worry about your pet seatbelt reacting with water or any liquid that it will cause it to rust and lose its quality.

✦Adjustable✦ Zubality doggy seatbelt can be easily adjusted according to your need minimum length 49cm and maximum 75cm. The car dog leash comes in 2 colors for you to choose from.Two packs also available (Black & Black , Pink & Pink).

✦Simple to Use & Universal Fit✦ Active pets seat belt for car are design to be perfected fit. They are compatible with most of the cars & vans with a universal dog seat belt clip design - Easy to use and install. Our pet car seat belt features a 360° swivel clip allowing seamless attach also allow your pet to move freely within the desired seatbelt length.

✦100% Satisfaction Guaranteed✦ Zubality aim is to not letting our customer down. So choose us is equivalent to choose peace of mind we promised to do our utmost to provide our customers with the most satisfactory products.
description: Product description We cannot imagine a world without our pets - they are our best friends, our adventure companions and a source of joy and happiness. That's why we pride ourselves on manufacturing the highest quality dog car restraints. The Zubality Pets Seat Belt is designed to protect your pet to keep them in the seat and away from the center console when you are driving. It is made of high quality nylon fabric to ensure safety. The Zubality Pet Seat Belt features a solid zinc alloy twist lock and metal buckles to ensure durability. One Size Fits All Breeds: The Zubality Pet Harness can be easily adjusted. The adjustable harness gives you an extensive range from 19.68" to 30.0" and offers a perfect fit no matter the size of your dog small dogs, medium dogs, and large dogs . Easy to Adjust: Simply attach the pet seat belt to your pet harness and snap the belt loop directly into your vehicle's seat belt slot. Main features: Color: black and pink. Adjustable length: 49 cm to 75 cm. Material: nylon. Assorted Packages: 1 x Black Dog Belt Single Pack . 1 x Pink Dog Belt single pack . 2 x black dog belts 2 pieces . 2 x pink dog belts 2 pieces . Directions Attach the harness to your pet's collar or harness, then plug it into your car's seat belt. Adjust the harness for a comfortable and safe fit.
